docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,011.00 FILED BY MILEGUIR ELIAS AS TO DEFENDANT SIMON WILLARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-17-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SIMON WILLARD

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MILEGUIR ELIAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SIMON WILLARD $2,011.00 PRINCIPAL, $36.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,047.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,437.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED AS TO DEFENDANT SIMON WILLARD
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SIMON WILLARD
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $653.89 AS TO DEFENDANT SIMON WILLARD
